Contact

Let's talk about your current setup

Tell us what is happening in your CRM, pipeline, reporting or demand generation. We will reply with concrete next steps.

Send diagnosis Solutions
Data modelclean
Pipelinevisible
Automationcontrolled

Rotata

Context

The first conversation is about your current setup, not a generic sales pitch. We want to understand where the system is unclear.

  • CRM state
  • Pipeline visibility
  • Data quality
  • Automation
  • Sales and marketing handoff

Process

What happens after contact

You will get a practical review of where structure is missing and what should be fixed first.

  1. We review the current setup
  2. We identify blockers
  3. We define the first system priorities

System

What you get

The conversation should leave you with more clarity on how your current marketing and sales system is working.

  • Structural diagnosis
  • Priority map
  • Tool to system to outcome logic

Architecture

Direct contact

If you prefer direct contact, use WhatsApp, email or LinkedIn. All tracking hooks are prepared but no private keys are committed.

  • WhatsApp: +34 649 49 82 72
  • Email: info@rotata.com
  • LinkedIn: Rotata Consulting SL

Architecture

Who this is for

The best fit is a B2B company that needs a more reliable system behind growth.

  • HubSpot users
  • CRM owners
  • B2B sales teams
  • Marketing directors
  • Founders and CEOs

Diagnosis

Who this is not for

Rotata is not a quick-template agency or a tool reseller. If the goal is only a cheap campaign, this is probably not the right fit.

  • No generic templates
  • No tool-first selling
  • No fake guarantees

Measurement

Reassurance

The site is static-first now, Cloudflare-ready, and prepared for a future WordPress export so the client can edit content later.

  • No secrets in code
  • Consent-aware tracking
  • HubSpot-ready forms
  • WordPress exportable

Rotata
